_comment: JQL filters for CRFLT (Client Reporting) Jira project. All teams share one project and are separated by component.

statements.name: Statements Board
statements.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-statements" ORDER BY created DESC
statements.description: All issues owned by the Statements team

confirms.name: Confirms Board
confirms.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-confirms" ORDER BY created DESC
confirms.description: All issues owned by the Confirms (Trade Confirmations) team

letters.name: Letters Board
letters.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-letters" ORDER BY created DESC
letters.description: All issues owned by the Letters (Client Correspondence) team

overall_work_view.name: CRFLT — All Work
overall_work_view.jql: project = CRFLT ORDER BY created DESC
overall_work_view.description: Full project backlog across all three teams

bugs_overview.name: CRFLT — Bugs Overview
bugs_overview.jql: project = CRFLT AND issuetype = Bug ORDER BY priority DESC
bugs_overview.description: All open bugs sorted by priority

high_priority_issues.name: CRFLT — High Priority Issues
high_priority_issues.jql: project = CRFLT AND priority in (High, Highest) ORDER BY priority DESC, updated DESC
high_priority_issues.description: Issues flagged as High or Highest priority across all teams

statements_distribution.name: CR-statements — Issue Distribution
statements_distribution.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-statements" ORDER BY issuetype ASC
statements_distribution.description: Statements team issues grouped by type and status

confirms_distribution.name: CR-confirms — Issue Distribution
confirms_distribution.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-confirms" ORDER BY issuetype ASC
confirms_distribution.description: Confirms team issues grouped by type and status

letters_distribution.name: CR-letters — Issue Distribution
letters_distribution.jql: project = CRFLT AND component = "CR-letters" ORDER BY issuetype ASC
letters_distribution.description: Letters team issues grouped by type and status

active_sprint.name: CRFLT — Active Sprint
active_sprint.jql: project = CRFLT AND sprint in openSprints() ORDER BY assignee ASC
active_sprint.description: All issues in the current active sprint

in_progress.name: CRFLT — In Progress
in_progress.jql: project = CRFLT AND status = "In Progress" ORDER BY updated DESC
in_progress.description: All currently in-progress issues across all teams

open_blockers.name: CRFLT — Open Blockers
open_blockers.jql: project = CRFLT AND priority = Highest AND status not in (Done, Closed) ORDER BY updated DESC
open_blockers.description: Critical blockers that need immediate attention

pending_qa.name: Ready for QA Review
pending_qa.jql: project = CRFLT AND status = "In Review" ORDER BY priority DESC
pending_qa.description: Tickets ready for QA Agent analysis

qa_completed.name: QA Agent Processed
qa_completed.jql: project = CRFLT AND labels = "qa-agent-reviewed" ORDER BY updated DESC
qa_completed.description: Tickets that have been processed by the QA Agent
